# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# https://curl.se/docs/http-cookies.html
# This file was generated by a browser extension. Edit at your own risk.
#
# HOW TO FILL THIS FILE:
# 1. Install "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" Chrome extension
# 2. Log into instagram.com in your browser
# 3. Click the extension on instagram.com and export
# 4. Replace this file's contents with the exported cookies
#
